title: Co-Design Workshop Protocol and Facilitation Materials for Design Futures Exploration of Digital Mental Health Technologies for Young People
author: Balaskas, Andreas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the protocol and facilitation materials developed for a co-design workshop aimed at exploring future digital mental health technologies for young people. It includes the workshop protocol, templates, personas, technology scenarios, phase-specific activities, post-workshop materials, and supporting resources. The full structured set of materials is provided in the accompanying ZIP archive. 
 This work was developed within COST Action CA23153 YouthDMH – Digital Mental Health for Young People, Working Group 3 (Contextual and Early Assessment and Intervention). 
 To acknowledge this work or reuse the materials, please cite: 
 Balaskas, A., Callejas, Z., Krasniqi, E., Guzman Parra, J., & De Witte, N. A. J. (2026).  Co-Design Workshop Protocol and Facilitation Materials for Design Futures Exploration of Digital Mental Health Technologies for Young People . Zenodo.  https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20527374  
 License: CC BY 4.0.
